channel.title: NRIBeat — Daily Pulse for Indian Americans
channel.description: Immigration, AI, Cricket, Bollywood, and Layoffs — curated daily for the Indian-American community.

item.title: Grok AI Prompt Generator: Best AI Tool for 2026
item.description: Grok AI now auto-generates detailed prompts for image and video creation, making visual content generation 2-3x faster. For Indian engineers in the US, this is a productivity lever that affects portfolio building, side projects, and machine learning salary conversations. It's also a real alternative to ChatGPT for creative workflow automation in 2026.

item.title: Bangladesh Cricket: Mehidy, Litton Captains Until 2027 World Cups
item.description: Bangladesh locks in Mehidy Hasan Miraz and Litton Das as ODI and T20I captains until 2027 World Cups, signaling strategic stability. Mohammad Rafique joins as spin consultant for one year. For US-based Indian diaspora fans, this move shows how South Asian cricket boards are investing in long-term planning and specialized coaching.

item.title: Ranveer Singh's Pralay: New Bollywood Movie 2025 Post-Apocalyptic Epic
item.description: Ranveer Singh's upcoming film Prayal is an original post-apocalyptic concept (not an adaptation) directed by Hansal Mehta. This ambitious new Bollywood movie 2025 will likely hit theaters first before streaming on Netflix India or Prime Video. For diaspora audiences, it promises fresh, large-scale Indian storytelling unlike typical Bollywood fare.

item.title: GT Bowlers Need Consistency: Hayden's IPL 2026 Reality Check
item.description: Gujarat Titans need urgent course correction. Matthew Hayden is demanding discipline from bowlers (nine wides is too many) and aggressive batting (seven sixes isn't enough). In IPL 2026, these basics will determine if GT stays competitive.

item.title: April 2026 Visa Bulletin: EB-2 India Final Action Date Holds Steady to July 15, 2014
item.description: April 2026 Visa Bulletin: EB-2 India Final Action Date holds steady to July 15, 2014; EB-3 India to November 15, 2013. Dates for Filing: EB-2 January 15, 2015, EB-3 January 15, 2015. No movement this month — monitor the next bulletin closely.

item.title: Rajkummar Rao's Toaster on Netflix April 15: Dark Comedy
item.description: Rajkummar Rao and Sanya Malhotra star in Netflix's Toaster, a dark comedy premiering April 15, 2026, about a money-obsessed man whose extreme frugality sparks chaos. Available exclusively on Netflix in the USA with no extra cost for existing subscribers. Perfect for fans of intelligent Indian cinema with unique premises.

item.title: AI in Urban Warfare: What Indian Tech Pros Should Know [2026]
item.description: AI is reshaping cities into dual-use systems—more efficient but also more vulnerable. Indian tech professionals in the US now have urgent demand for AI skills in critical infrastructure and defense-tech, with salaries 20-40% above standard SWE roles. Upskilling in adversarial robustness and systems security could unlock six-figure opportunities within 12 months.

item.title: AI in Creative Industries 2026: What It Means for Your Tech Career
item.description: K-pop and entertainment are rapidly adopting AI for music generation, video creation, and artist management. For Indian software engineers, this opens lucrative career paths in creative tech with machine learning salaries 25-50% higher than traditional SaaS. Learn production-adjacent AI skills, build a portfolio with audio/video projects, and explore open-source alternatives to ChatGPT — these are baseline requirements for the highest-paying roles in this emerging field.

item.title: South Africa Cricket Coach: Where Are the Gaps? 2026
item.description: South African coach Mashimbyi reveals the real issue after losing to New Zealand: partnerships are missing. For India cricket fans in the US, this is a key lesson in why Test and ODI success depends on batters building 50+ run stands together, not just individual brilliance. Stay tuned for India vs Australia test coverage.

item.title: MI vs DC IPL 2025: Three Changes as Hardik Ruled Out
item.description: Mumbai Indians face Delhi Capitals in IPL 2025 without captain Hardik Pandya, bringing in Chahar, Bosch, and Santner as replacements. DC keeps their bowling unchanged, sensing an advantage. For US-based fans, this reshuffle makes for crucial cricket—watch how MI's depth handles the leadership vacuum.

item.title: New Zealand T20 World Cup 2026: Can They Replicate ODI Success?
item.description: New Zealand is peaking at exactly the right time heading into the T20 World Cup 2026, with Sophie Green's team proving they can dominate quality opposition. Their recent ODI sweep over South Africa has given them serious momentum and confidence—making them genuine contenders to challenge India and other favorites. For US-based cricket fans, this is a storyline worth following.

item.title: South Africa Cricket Decider vs NZ: Bosch's Bold Strategy Explained
item.description: South Africa faces New Zealand in a cricket decider with momentum after a star batter's career-best 91-run performance. Coach Bosch's simple philosophy—avoid overcomplicating strategy—could be the key to clinching the series. US-based Indian cricket fans can stream the match via Willow TV or ESPN+ despite early morning kickoff times.

item.title: Ranbir Kapoor's Ramayana OTT Deal: Rs. 1000 Crore Bid 2026
item.description: Producer Namit Malhotra rejected a Rs. 700 crore OTT bid for the Ranbir Kapoor and Yash-starrer Ramayana, now targeting a Rs. 1000 crore streaming deal. The two-part epic, with a Rs. 4000 crore budget, will likely stream on Disney+ Hotstar, Netflix, or Prime Video after its 2026 theatrical release. This is a must-watch for Bollywood fans seeking premium Indian cinema.

item.title: Vlaeminck Returns: Fast Bowler's Comeback After Shoulder Injury 2026
item.description: Fast bowler Vlaeminck gets cleared to return after 18 months away from a shoulder dislocation suffered at the 2024 T20 World Cup. Her comeback strengthens India's women's cricket pace attack heading into IPL 2025 and international series. Watch Willow TV or Disney+ Hotstar from the US for her first match back.

item.title: CSK's Gaikwad on IPL 2025: Let Youngsters Embrace Pressure
item.description: CSK captain Ruturaj Gaikwad is championing a development-focused approach for IPL 2025, backing young players to learn from mistakes rather than fear failure. After a rough opening, the franchise heads home with renewed confidence in their youth, showing why the IPL is cricket's greatest talent factory.

item.title: KiloClaw: Enterprise AI Security for Indian Tech Teams in 2026
item.description: Kilo's KiloClaw addresses the "shadow AI" problem where developers use unauthorized AI tools on personal infrastructure. For Indian engineers in US tech roles, this is critical: it creates a legal way to use powerful AI without risking compliance violations or job security. Early adoption signals seniority and could directly impact your next role and salary negotiations.

item.title: Anthropic's GitHub Takedown: What It Means for AI Engineers in 2026
item.description: Anthropic accidentally mass-removed thousands of GitHub repos while targeting its leaked source code—a mistake now retracted. For you: API users are safe, but this accelerates the shift toward open-source AI tools like Llama. If you're building your ML career in 2026, multi-tool expertise (not single-platform dependency) is now the competitive advantage.

item.title: EB-2 India May 2026 Visa Bulletin Prediction: Modest Forward Movement Expected
item.description: We predict EB-2 India will advance 10-16 days in May 2026, landing around July 25-31, 2014, with 72% confidence. This represents typical May-period steady movement with low retrogression risk, as the fiscal year is still in mid-phase.

item.title: Bollywood vs Hollywood: IMAX Screen Wars Heat Up in 2025
item.description: Project Hail Mary, Dhurandhar: The Revenge Round 2, and The Super Mario Galaxy Movie are battling for IMAX screens in India. For NRIs in the US, these films will arrive on streaming platforms (Disney+ Hotstar, Netflix, Prime Video) within 30-90 days of theatrical release. Expect Bollywood entries on Hotstar first.

item.title: Rassie van der Dussen Retires: Impact on India Cricket & IPL 2025
item.description: South African batter Rassie van der Dussen has retired from international cricket but will continue playing franchise cricket (potentially IPL 2025) and mentoring young cricketers. This marks a shift in how elite players structure their careers post-international cricket. US-based cricket fans should watch for his potential IPL involvement, which offers more convenient viewing times than international tours.
